revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '/* Article stub message box styles */ .asbox { background: transparent; font-style: italic; }'
navbar position change to prevent overlap on mobile
rv 1 edit, cologneblue doesn't play nicely

Protected "[[Template:Asbox/styles.css]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]; requested at [[WP:RfPP]]: [[Special:Permalink/1010366818#Template:Asbox/styles.css]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
per edit request on talk page - hide page overflow

Arbitrarily0 moved page [[Template:Asbox/styles.css]] to [[Template:Article stub box/styles.css]] without leaving a redirect: [[Wikipedia:Requested moves|requested move]]; see [[Template talk:Article stub box]]
Arbitrarily0 moved page [[Template:Article stub box/styles.css]] to [[Template:Asbox/styles.css]] without leaving a redirect: Revert
Izno moved page [[Template:Asbox/styles.css]] to [[Module:Article stub box/styles.css]] without leaving a redirect: 1) follow move. 2) move to module namespace since this is generated by the module

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 20 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Article_stub_box/styles.css]]
